feed.description: Long-form conversations about sustainability, systems thinking, and the ideas shaping our shared future.
feed.title: The Long View

bullets: Welcome back to The Long View — Sustainability. Today we're talking about macroeconomics, and I'm joined by Skanda Eminas, macro economist. Skanda Eminas, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Dr. Elena Fisher was on last week talking about systems thinking.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to The Long View — Sustainability. Today we're talking about macroeconomics, and I'm joined by Skanda Eminas, macro economist. Skanda Eminas, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Severe Garbles: A Macro Discussion
